@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+﻿namespace ProjectSight.WebLayer.WebUI.API
+{
+    // A simple DTO (Data Transfer Object) to hold combined search results for the POC
+    public class GlobalSearchResult
+    {
+        public string RecordId { get; set; } // Use string for flexibility (e.g., RFI_ID is int, DrawingID might be different)
+        public string RecordType { get; set; } // e.g., "RFI", "Drawing"
+        public string DisplayText { get; set; } // A primary text to show (e.g., "RFI 123: Subject", "Drawing A1.01")
+        public string Snippet { get; set; } // A small piece of matching text or secondary info
+        public string NavigationUrl { get; set; } // A URL to navigate to the record (you'll need to figure out the URL structure)
+    }
+}
\ No newline at end of file
